mapper.insert: insert into invoices ( invoice_no, company_id, status, invoice_amount, principal_amount, interest_amount, interest_start_date, issue_date, due_date, notes, created_by_user_id ) values ( #{invoiceNo}, #{companyId}, #{status}, #{invoiceAmount}, #{principalAmount}, #{interestAmount}, #{interestStartDate}, #{issueDate}, #{dueDate}, #{notes}, #{createdByUserId} )
mapper.update:
update invoices
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo},
company_id = #{companyId},
status = #{status},
invoice_amount = #{invoiceAmount},
principal_amount = #{principalAmount},
interest_amount = #{interestAmount},
interest_start_date = #{interestStartDate},
issue_date = #{issueDate},
due_date = #{dueDate},
notes = #{notes},
created_by_user_id = #{createdByUserId},
where id = #{id}
mapper.sql: from invoices left join companies on invoices.company_id = companies.id left join users on invoices.created_by_user_id = users.id
mapper.select:
select invoices.id, invoices.invoice_no, invoices.status, companies.company_name, invoices.invoice_amount, invoices.principal_amount, invoices.interest_amount, invoices.issue_date, invoices.due_date, invoices.interest_start_date, users.real_name as create_by, invoices.notes
order by invoices.id limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}

select invoices.id, invoices.invoice_no, invoices.status, companies.company_name, invoices.invoice_amount, invoices.principal_amount, invoices.interest_amount, invoices.issue_date, invoices.due_date, invoices.interest_start_date, users.real_name as create_by, invoices.notes
where invoices.id = #{id}

select invoices.id, invoices.invoice_no, invoices.status, companies.company_name, invoices.invoice_amount, invoices.principal_amount, invoices.interest_amount, invoices.issue_date, invoices.due_date, invoices.interest_start_date, users.real_name as create_by, invoices.notes
where invoices.invoice_no = #{invoiceNo}

select coalesce(sum(invoice_amount), 0) from invoices where status in
#{status}
